positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a thriving forest at dusk. The scene features overlapping silhouettes of diverse flora—giant ferns, stylized oak leaves, and delicate wildflowers—intertwined with subtle, glowing elements that suggest magic or energy. The overall composition should be symmetrical and centralized, perfect for a central chest print on apparel. Use a deep indigo and teal color palette contrasted with burnt orange and gold accents for the glowing elements. The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau and modern graphic illustration, utilizing clean vector lines and strong, negative space contrast. High detail, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, cropped, low resolution, bad anatomy, ugly, amateur, extra limbs
